title: Sultanat
subTitle: Sultan, a brave warrior, tries to win the affections of Yasmin, a beautiful woman. However, his life turns upside down when his father is killed by a general, whom he swears revenge against.

title: Ghar Mein Ram Gali Mein Shyam
subTitle: Amar weds a village belle and they move to the city where she meets her neighbours Mr and Mrs Dharamchand. Soon, Amar begins to doubt her fidelity and Dharamchand devises a scheme to separate them.

title: Kundan
subTitle: Thakur Shamsher Singh, a wealthy criminal, tries to befriend a newly-appointed police officer in order to gain his favour, only to find out that the policeman is immune to his tactics.

title: Gurudev
subTitle: Dev Kumar, a police inspector, finds himself in a dilemma when has to arrest a notorious criminal who also happens to the father of his childhood friend, Guru.

title: Daraar
subTitle: Raj Malhotra, a wealthy man, falls for Priya. However, things get complicated when Vikram, Priya's abusive husband, enters the frame.

title: Daanveer
subTitle: After the death of his parents, Vijay becomes a car driver to support his family. His hardships increase when his sister's marriage falls through.

title: Fateh
subTitle: Ranvir, Karan and Salim, commandos trained by Major Anand, are shattered when the latter is killed. They soon learn that a gangster, Samrat, may be responsible for his death and try to find the truth.

title: Police Officer
subTitle: Jai, a kind-hearted policeman gets killed during one of his encounters. His twin, who is an infamous conman, decides to track down Jai's murderer.

title: Ram Balram
subTitle: Unaware of his evil intentions and his role in killing their parents, two brothers Ram and Balram fall victim to their deceitful uncle. They must unite to foil his plans of gaining wealth.

title: Ram Balram
subTitle: Unaware of his evil intentions and his role in killing their parents, two brothers Ram and Balram fall victim to their deceitful uncle. They must unite to foil his plans of gaining wealth.

title: Azad Desh Ka Andha Kanoon
subTitle: An honest policemen is forced to choose between duty and family when his brother is caught as part of a gang producing blue-films. He must also protect a witness whose life is threatened.

title: Daav Pench
subTitle: A man borrows a huge amount of money for his daughter's operation. Things take a turn when a group of criminals steal his money, and he turns to a police officer for help.

title: Majaal
subTitle: Vijay Kumar, an orphan, is brought up by an advocate. While he falls in love with his daughter and marries her, he struggles to cope with the humiliation he faces from her family.

title: Zakhmi Aurat
subTitle: Determined to exact revenge on the goons who gangraped her, Inspector Kiran Dutt, takes matters into her own hands as the law fails to give her justice.

title: Hero Hindustani
subTitle: A young woman conspires with a man to fake a relationship, outsmarting her grandfather's plans to marry her off to a stranger.

title: Kudrat Ka Kanoon
subTitle: When the good doctor Vijay is falsely accused and imprisoned, his wife and daughter, desperately seeking justice, are terrorised and slandered by the harsh eyes of the society.

title: Naseeb
subTitle: The lives of friends Namdev, Raghu, Damu and Jaggi take a turn for the worse when they win a lottery. Raghu and Damu murder Jaggi and frame Namdev who later returns to seek revenge.

title: Ghatak / Lethal
subTitle: For his father's treatment, Kashi and his father move into a colony on the outskirts of Mumbai. But when Kashi sees a local gangster terrorise the colony, he decides to strike back.

title: Ghatak / Lethal
subTitle: For his father's treatment, Kashi and his father move into a colony on the outskirts of Mumbai. But when Kashi sees a local gangster terrorise the colony, he decides to strike back.

title: Saath Naa Chhodenge
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: B4U Kadak
subTitle: Ram and Anjali, belonging to two rival families, fall in love. Later, after they come from abroad, they strive to reunite their loved ones.

title: Zubeidaa
subTitle: Brought up by his maternal grandmother, Riyaz is on a determined quest to find and understand his mother. His search ultimately takes him on the complex journey his mother went through.

title: Laila
subTitle: Deshraj and Leela's love thrives under the shadows of enmity between two Rajput families. This triggers a clash of expectations, egos, and bullets, placing several lives in danger.

title: Rustum
subTitle: Abhishek Bhargav, a police officer, decides to avenge the death of his friend, DCP Bharath. When his investigation lands him in Bengaluru, he discovers the roots of an organ trading mafia.

title: Baadshah
subTitle: An amateur detective, Raj, goes by the nickname of Baadshah. But this name soon causes a misunderstanding that lands him in the middle of a conspiracy to assassinate the chief minister of Goa.

title: Papi Gudia
subTitle: A criminal uses a possessed doll to lure children and kill them. His latest target is Raju, the young brother of a dancer, who soon becomes the main suspect in a series of murders.

title: Loha
subTitle: After a bid to arrest Sher Singh fails, officer Dayal is crippled and his partner Amar's career is sabotaged. When Amar gets another chance to nab Sher Singh, he hires two crooks for the job.

title: The Real Tiger
subTitle: When a truck collides with his car, an exemplary politician goes into a coma. His police officer son learns that the accident is a deliberate attack and sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and exact his revenge.
